headline: Netflix raises subscription prices across all plans in US
summary: March 26 (Reuters) - Netflix has increased prices on all its plans in the U.S., as the streaming giant pushes into new programming formats such as video podcasts and live sporting events.

raw.headline: Netflix raises subscription prices across all plans in US
raw.summary: March 26 (Reuters) - Netflix has increased prices on all its plans in the U.S., as the streaming giant pushes into new programming formats such as video podcasts and live sporting events.

headline: Netflix Raises Prices. Streaming Is Going to Keep Getting More Expensive.
summary: Netflix  stock rose Thursday following news that the company once again raised prices for its multiple subscription tiers, another sign for consumers that streaming will continue to get more expensive from here.  Netflix updated its plans page on Thursday.  “We continue offering a range of prices and plans to meet a variety of needs, and as we deliver more value to our members we are updating our prices to enable us to reinvest in quality entertainment and improve their experience,” a Netflix spokesperson said.

headline: Netflix confirms it’s raising prices again
summary: The standard plan without ads now costs $19.99 per month, a $2 increase from the previous $17.99 subscription fee, while the premium plan is also going up by $2 and will now cost $26.99 per month.

raw.headline: Netflix confirms it’s raising prices again

headline: Netflix Ends Warner Deal Talks To Focus On Core Growth Choices
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) has walked away from a potential acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. The decision removes the prospect of a large media merger that had drawn significant investor attention. By not pursuing the deal, Netflix preserves balance sheet flexibility and avoids a complex integration of content libraries and operations. Netflix is a global streaming and entertainment company, with a focus on subscription video services and original content. The broader media sector has...
